name: Knight
description: A tanky melee fighter with strong defense and shields equipment.

nodes.name: Piercing Thrust
nodes.descTemplate: Thrust your sword deeply forward, dealing {0}% physical damage to enemies in range.
nodes.desc: Thrust your sword deeply forward, dealing 250–330% physical damage to enemies in range.

nodes.name: Shield Charge
nodes.descTemplate: Raise your shield and charge forward. Deal {0}% physical damage to enemies you collide with.
nodes.desc: Raise your shield and charge forward. Deal 300–420% physical damage to enemies you collide with.

nodes.name: Retribution Strike
nodes.descTemplate: Strike enemies multiple times, dealing {0}% physical damage per hit. The lower the hero's HP, the more strikes.
nodes.desc: Strike enemies multiple times, dealing 150–230% physical damage per hit. The lower the hero's HP, the more strikes.

nodes.name: Aegis Field
nodes.descTemplate: Deploy a protective aura that blocks {0} damage for allies within the area.
nodes.desc: Deploy a protective aura that blocks 50–110 damage for allies within the area.

nodes.name: Sacred Blade
nodes.descTemplate: Imbue your sword with holy power. While buffed, attack damage increases by 50% and attacks restore {0} HP.
nodes.desc: Imbue your sword with holy power. While buffed, attack damage increases by 50% and attacks restore 2–10 HP.

nodes.name: Unyielding Will
nodes.descTemplate: Once per stage, when near-death, focus your mind to rise again with {0}% HP.
nodes.desc: Once per stage, when near-death, focus your mind to rise again with 30–70% HP.

name: Ranger
description: An agile archer specializing in precise ranged attacks with bow.

nodes.name: Rapid Fire
nodes.descTemplate: Fire multiple arrows in succession, dealing {0}% physical damage per arrow.
nodes.desc: Fire multiple arrows in succession, dealing 132–180% physical damage per arrow.

nodes.name: Scatter Shot
nodes.descTemplate: Fire multiple homing arrows. Deal {0}% physical damage per arrow.
nodes.desc: Fire multiple homing arrows. Deal 162–226% physical damage per arrow.

nodes.name: Arrow Rain
nodes.descTemplate: Fire multiple arrows into the sky, dealing {0}% physical damage to enemies in a wide area.
nodes.desc: Fire multiple arrows into the sky, dealing 215–319% physical damage to enemies in a wide area.

nodes.name: Swift Surge
nodes.descTemplate: Temporarily accelerate your metabolism. Attack speed increases by {0}% for the duration.
nodes.desc: Temporarily accelerate your metabolism. Attack speed increases by 50–90% for the duration.

nodes.name: Piercing Arrow
nodes.descTemplate: Fire a piercing arrow that deals {0}% physical damage to enemies hit.
nodes.desc: Fire a piercing arrow that deals 244–308% physical damage to enemies hit.

nodes.name: Skewer Shot
nodes.descTemplate: Fire a deep-wounding arrow. Damage increases by {0}% per lodged arrow; 3+ arrows cause bleeding.
nodes.desc: Fire a deep-wounding arrow. Damage increases by 100–220% per lodged arrow; 3+ arrows cause bleeding.

name: Sorcerer
description: A powerful mage dealing devastating area magic damage.

nodes.name: Fireball
nodes.descTemplate: A fireball that explodes on impact, dealing {0}% AoE fire damage.
nodes.desc: A fireball that explodes on impact, dealing 270–370% AoE fire damage.

nodes.name: Ice Orb
nodes.descTemplate: Summon an ice orb and hurl it at enemies. Slows enemies hit and deals {0}% multi-hit cold damage.
nodes.desc: Summon an ice orb and hurl it at enemies. Slows enemies hit and deals 150–198% multi-hit cold damage.

nodes.name: Lightning
nodes.descTemplate: Unleash electricity forward, dealing {0}% lightning damage to enemies.
nodes.desc: Unleash electricity forward, dealing 255–363% lightning damage to enemies.

nodes.name: Flame Hydra
nodes.descTemplate: Summon a hydra that fires fireballs dealing {0}% damage.
nodes.desc: Summon a hydra that fires fireballs dealing 230–290% damage.

nodes.name: Snowstorm
nodes.descTemplate: Summon a mass of ice shards raining on enemies. Deals {0}% cold damage per second and chills enemies in the area.
nodes.desc: Summon a mass of ice shards raining on enemies. Deals 50–114% cold damage per second and chills enemies in the area.

nodes.name: Meteor Strike
nodes.descTemplate: Summon a meteor, dealing {0}% damage to enemies in a wide area.
nodes.desc: Summon a meteor, dealing 550–730% damage to enemies in a wide area.

name: Priest
description: A holy healer who supports allies with restoration magic.

nodes.name: Heal
nodes.descTemplate: Restore one ally's HP by an amount equal to {0}% of their maximum HP.
nodes.desc: Restore one ally's HP by an amount equal to 10–18% of their maximum HP.

nodes.name: Blessing Of Might
nodes.descTemplate: A blessing active while equipped. Increases attack damage of self and nearby party members by {0}%.
nodes.desc: A blessing active while equipped. Increases attack damage of self and nearby party members by 50–90%.

nodes.name: Wrath of Heaven
nodes.descTemplate: Imbue your scepter with divine lightning. For the duration, attacks deal {0}% lightning area damage.
nodes.desc: Imbue your scepter with divine lightning. For the duration, attacks deal 430–590% lightning area damage.

nodes.name: Sanctuary
nodes.descTemplate: Deploy a holy sanctuary across the battlefield. For the duration, all allies inside regenerate {0} HP per second.
nodes.desc: Deploy a holy sanctuary across the battlefield. For the duration, all allies inside regenerate 30–82 HP per second.

nodes.name: Blessing of Warding
nodes.descTemplate: A blessing active while equipped. Increases elemental resistance of self and nearby party members by {0}.
nodes.desc: A blessing active while equipped. Increases elemental resistance of self and nearby party members by 10–30.

nodes.name: Resurrection
nodes.descTemplate: Revive a fallen party member with {0}% of their max HP.
nodes.desc: Revive a fallen party member with 30–50% of their max HP.

name: Hunter
description: A tactical expert using traps and crossbow.

nodes.name: Explosive Bolt
nodes.descTemplate: Fire a crossbow bolt that explodes on impact, dealing {0}% area fire damage.
nodes.desc: Fire a crossbow bolt that explodes on impact, dealing 484–688% area fire damage.

nodes.name: Frost Bolt
nodes.descTemplate: Fire a crossbow bolt that explodes on impact, dealing {0}% area cold damage and freezing enemies hit.
nodes.desc: Fire a crossbow bolt that explodes on impact, dealing 210–270% area cold damage and freezing enemies hit.

nodes.name: Quick Loader
nodes.descTemplate: Rapidly reload crossbow bolts. Attack speed increases by 50% for {0} attacks.
nodes.desc: Rapidly reload crossbow bolts. Attack speed increases by 50% for 3–7 attacks.

nodes.name: Charge Trap
nodes.descTemplate: Launch {0} traps that explode when struck by elemental damage.
nodes.desc: Launch 2–6 traps that explode when struck by elemental damage.

nodes.name: Crossbow Turret
nodes.descTemplate: Deploy an automated crossbow that fires bolts dealing {0}% physical damage.
nodes.desc: Deploy an automated crossbow that fires bolts dealing 175–239% physical damage.

nodes.name: Shock Bolt
nodes.descTemplate: Fire a crossbow bolt that lodges in an enemy and emits lightning for a time. The bolt releases currents dealing {0}% lightning damage to nearby enemies.
nodes.desc: Fire a crossbow bolt that lodges in an enemy and emits lightning for a time. The bolt releases currents dealing 270–350% lightning damage to nearby enemies.

name: Slayer
description: A wild berserker dealing devastating melee damage through rage.

nodes.name: Slam Jump
nodes.descTemplate: Gather strength and smash an enemy for {0}% physical damage. If it kills the enemy, a shockwave deals 350% damage to nearby enemies.
nodes.desc: Gather strength and smash an enemy for 310–410% physical damage. If it kills the enemy, a shockwave deals 350% damage to nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Crushing Blow
nodes.descTemplate: Gather strength and smash an enemy for {0}% physical damage. If it kills the enemy, a shockwave deals 350% damage to nearby enemies.
nodes.desc: Gather strength and smash an enemy for 620–780% physical damage. If it kills the enemy, a shockwave deals 350% damage to nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Commander’s Cry
nodes.descTemplate: Let out a cry that stuns nearby enemies and increases party critical chance multiplier by {0}%.
nodes.desc: Let out a cry that stuns nearby enemies and increases party critical chance multiplier by 50–70%.

nodes.name: Ground Slam
nodes.descTemplate: Smash the ground hard, causing an earthquake that deals {0}% physical damage to enemies. Rocks created by the earthquake explode when hit by AoE physical attacks.
nodes.desc: Smash the ground hard, causing an earthquake that deals 370–470% physical damage to enemies. Rocks created by the earthquake explode when hit by AoE physical attacks.

nodes.name: Axe Spin
nodes.descTemplate: Spin with an axe, dealing {0}% physical damage per second to nearby enemies and a chance to apply bleeding. Attacks against bleeding enemies deal bonus damage.
nodes.desc: Spin with an axe, dealing 100–132% physical damage per second to nearby enemies and a chance to apply bleeding. Attacks against bleeding enemies deal bonus damage.

nodes.name: Bloodlust
nodes.descTemplate: Consume half of current HP to increase attack damage by {0}% for a time.
nodes.desc: Consume half of current HP to increase attack damage by 400–520% for a time.
